name: File Creation by PowerShell
description: Detects the creation of new files by PowerShell, which can indicate malicious activity such as malware installation or data exfiltration preparation.

prompts.prompt: PowerShell detected creating a new file, which could indicate malware installation or data exfiltration preparation. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}, **Image** {Image}, **Target Filename** {TargetFilename}, **Creation UTC Time** {CreationUtcTime}. Investigate this activity for potential malicious file creation.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for file creation (11).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account that created the file.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process image that created the file (powershell.exe).

parameters.name: TargetFilename
parameters.description: The full path and name of the created file.

parameters.name: CreationUtcTime
parameters.description: The UTC time when the file was created.
